summary: Multiple vehicles are traveling on a multi-laned urban road at night. The vehicle in front emits brake lights intermittently, indicating deceleration or stopping.

events_timeline.event: The white sedan emits brake lights intermittently, suggesting deceleration or stopping.

uncertainties: Whether the brake lights indicate braking or just deceleration is unclear.
The presence of rain or wet roads cannot be confirmed.

risk_assessment.why: Intermittent brake lights may suggest reduced traction due to wet conditions or cautious driving.
